system.effect: The psyker creates a barrier of telekinetic force to deflect ranged attacks. The psyker gains a force field with a Protection Rating equal to Psy Rating x 10, which can be used to deflect ranged attacks.

description.value: The psyker throws up a shield of telekinetic force in front of himself, deflecting incoming projectiles and energy blasts. This functions as a force field with a Protection Rating equal to Psy Rating x 10. The shield can be activated as a Reaction when the psyker is targeted by a ranged attack.
